title: ferray-random: no bytes() method for raw random bytes
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.bytes(length) returns raw random bytes as a Python bytes object. ferray-random's BitGenerator trait has fill_bytes(&mut [u8]) but there's no Generator-level method that returns an array of random bytes or a Vec<u8>. This is useful for cryptographic-adjacent applications, testing, and generating random binary data. Simple to add: delegate to bg.fill_bytes().
